'''Collus''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was one of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] most advanced [[Philosopher/Legends|philosophers]].

==Biography==
A native of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], Collus was responsible for establishing his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld's]] most famous [[University of Alderaan/Legends|university]] in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Aldera/Legends|Aldera]], which expanded over the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] as other campuses of his institution were erected throughout the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] and beyond. Collus firmly believed that knowledge had to be applied in order to be meaningful, and that direct experience was more important than what was learned from [[Book/Legends|textbooks]] and data disks.

After his [[Death/Legends|passing]], Collus became a celebrated hero of the [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaanian]] people. Many institutions were named after him, and University students formed the organization [[Students of Collus]], which became a vanguard of many [[Politics/Legends|political]] movements in Aldera.

==Appearances==
